query:
# Context Refresh Failed

workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core

Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size

Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

transcript.content: 会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

decision.archive_summary: Earlier extension work established UI/behavior requirements and claimed fixes: remove the context meter; when no workspace is open show `Ctx: no workspace` and include the bound workspace path in the tooltip; each VS Code window refreshes independently per workspace; clicking the status bar should open immediately and refresh asynchronously with cache/Loading state. The active topic later narrowed to debugging `Ctx: error` / context refresh failures for the unified-memory-core workspace.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn stays automatically and is still on the same active troubleshooting topic as t10-t11, so relation is continue. Raw context needed next is the immediately preceding failure report and diagnosis context (t10-t11) plus the latest user turn t12. Earlier UI requirement/fix discussion is solved and not needed as raw evidence for the next response, but the main durable product requirements from t2 and t4 are worth preserving as compact pins.

applied.archiveSummary: Earlier extension work established UI/behavior requirements and claimed fixes: remove the context meter; when no workspace is open show `Ctx: no workspace` and include the bound workspace path in the tooltip; each VS Code window refreshes independently per workspace; clicking the status bar should open immediately and refresh asynchronously with cache/Loading state. The active topic later narrowed to debugging `Ctx: error` / context refresh failures for the unified-memory-core workspace.
